$comment: Rights registry for the /fetch-and-stage C-HERO intake pipeline (Step 0). An exact domain match here resolves rights automatically to the class recorded on the entry. Entries are added ONLY with the founder's explicit confirmation — an agent may propose, never register. Domains not listed require a direct rights answer from the founder.
status: RATIFIED by founder 2026-07-08 (KAMA scope) — in-session confirmation, C-HERO KAMA intake

kamaqc.com.rights_source: Shandong KAMA Automobile Manufacturing Co., Ltd. — official Chinese corporate site (ICP 鲁ICP备10210494号)

global-kama.com.rights_source: Shandong KAMA Automobile Manufacturing Co., Ltd. — official English export site (linked from kamaqc.com)

kamaauto.cn.rights_source: KAMA Auto export brand site — footer names Shandong KAMA Automobile Manufacturing Co., Ltd. as parent; self-hosted product photography
kamaauto.cn.note: Self-describes as export/trading brand, not the factory — founder accepted as manufacturer_kit for KAMA product photography.

kamaqc.en.made-in-china.com.rights_source: Made-in-China storefront operated by Shandong KAMA Automobile Manufacturing Co., Ltd. (manufacturer's own storefront)
kamaqc.en.made-in-china.com.note: Marketplace domain; images are platform derivatives (~1000px class) — expect pre-flight kills on resolution and platform watermarks.

cnkama.en.made-in-china.com.rights_source: Made-in-China storefront operated by KAMA Automobile Import and Export (Chongqing) Co., Ltd. (manufacturer's export arm)
cnkama.en.made-in-china.com.note: Marketplace domain; same caveats as kamaqc storefront.

policy_notes.sku_match: Founder ruling 2026-07-08: family-level photography is acceptable for series SKUs (kama-serie-*) when body type, cabin configuration and GVW class verifiably match the family spec. Single-model SKUs (kama-gm67e, kama-m36f) require an exact-unit match or defer.
policy_notes.not_ratified: kama-automotive.com (trading arm, unclear), kamavehicle.com (CHTC used-vehicle trader), chinatrucks.org and all third-party dealers/aggregators — every fetch from these requires a fresh founder decision.
